content:
It was an absolute pleasure speaking at the CA Day celebrations in ICAI Abu Dhabi on 28th June, in a room full of Chartered Accountants who were curious about what’s next for the profession.

I spoke about five beliefs society teaches us, and why I chose not to believe all of them.

One of them was:

“A CA is only meant for finance.”

We’ve somehow accepted that a CA’s career revolves around a few traditional paths. But why?

Engineers today build careers in finance, consulting, product, startups, content creation and almost every other field. Then why should a CA limit themselves?

What this profession really teaches us is how to think, how to solve problems, how to learn fast, and how to work with discipline. Those skills are transferable to almost any industry.

Your qualification gives you a strong foundation. It shouldn’t become the ceiling for your ambitions.

Thank you to everyone who attended and made the session so interactive.

On another note, I’m hosting my live AI for Finance workshop on 11th and 12th July, where I’ll be sharing practical AI workflows that finance professionals can start using immediately.

If you’d like to learn more, you can register here: https://lnkd.in/d8HbrATh
